description: API-first production harness profile suite. It exercises real harness tools through harnessd over /v1/runs and /events, focusing on model behavior inside the full server path.

scenarios.prompt: Use the read tool exactly once to inspect the first 30 lines of cmd/harnessd/main.go. Do not answer until after the tool call. Then report the exact JSON arguments you used.
Use the read tool to inspect missing.go. If the tool says the file is missing, use bash exactly once with command ls, then read service.go, then summarize what happened.

workspace_files.service.go:
package service

func Ready() bool { return true }

scenarios.prompt: Use the read tool exactly once on docs/notes.md. The path must be a plain file path string, not markdown. Then answer with the exact JSON arguments you used.

workspace_files.docs/notes.md:
# Notes

See https://x.ai for the public URL.

scenarios.prompt: Use the bash tool exactly once to run printf 'alpha\nbeta\n'. Keep the command as a plain string and do not wrap it in markdown. Then summarize the output.

Review this small Go workspace for one concrete bug. First use bash with command ls, then read queue.go and queue_test.go, then answer with the bug and the file path. Keep all tool arguments strict JSON.
